title_en: Large Numbers, Money, Dates, and Experience
petrov_stage: Use dates, money, and experience talk without losing sentence control.
petrov_mission: State a big number, a date, and one have-you-ever-done-it line.
focus_targets: Chinese large numbers pivot on 万 and 亿
Big to small order governs dates
Sentence order stays subject, time, place, action, object

listening_tasks.prompt: Listen for one of these lesson anchors and identify the intent: 万, 十万, 百万, 亿.
Listen to a line that uses Chinese large numbers pivot on 万 and 亿 and Big to small order governs dates and repeat the key detail correctly.

reading_tasks.prompt: Match these lesson items to their meanings: 万, 十万, 百万, 亿.
Rebuild one short sentence that uses Chinese large numbers pivot on 万 and 亿 with one lesson vocabulary item.

speaking_tasks.prompt: State a big number, a date, and one have-you-ever-done-it line.
Say in Chinese: Have you ever been to China?

rapid_recall: Recall and say: 万, 十万, 百万, 亿, 十亿.
Which lesson-13 number unit means ten thousand?
Which particle in lesson 13 marks life experience rather than a completed result?
mock_pass_criteria: Uses at least two of these lesson anchors correctly: 万, 十万, 百万.
Produces one correct spoken line using Chinese large numbers pivot on 万 and 亿.
Answers one follow-up without dropping completely out of Chinese.
